response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: they are overqualified, have minimal Java exposure (only listed in skills with no project context), and have only basic German — a hard requirement for client-facing roles in Germany's insurance sector. Their career trajectory suggests senior/lead roles, not entry-level contribution.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and public technical workshops
Proven agile and DevOps practices (CI/CD, TDD, GitLab, Docker)
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails critical language requirement
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, misaligned with entry-level role
No demonstrated Java project work despite listing it as a skill
